stemHtml: An Aeroplane Condition Monitoring System (ACMS) makes use of aircraft input data and also…

options.a: a headset jack, a data management unit, and outputs (e.g. a printer or ACARS).
options.b: an area microphone, a recording unit, and an erase button.
options.c: an erase button, a data management unit, and a headset jack.
options.d: a data management unit, a recording unit, and outputs (e.g. a printer or ACARS).
